title: FCERM research outcomes and impact
body: "Summary  This collection of case studies highlights how research has been used to improve flood and coastal erosion risk management (FCERM) by connecting people who have operational problems with researchers who have solutions.  Case studies are grouped by FCERM areas of research interest - areas where research needs to be targeted to increase resilience to flooding and coastal change.  "

taxons.title: River maintenance, flooding and coastal erosion
